place: Plai Laem, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Premium Cascade-Terraced Resort Villas - Plai Laem
blurb: A boutique resort of eleven turnkey villas terraced into a Koh Samui hillside — fully furnished, hotel-managed and built for premium rental yield. Clubhouse, gym, butler and electric-car service included, on a 30-year renewable leasehold. Three- and four-bedroom homes now available from ฿13,000,000.
detail:
A boutique resort of eleven premium villas arranged in stepped, cascade-style terraces that fold the architecture into the Koh Samui landscape. Each three- or four-bedroom home is designed for a discerning owner — clean contemporary lines, walls of glass and a private pool framing maximised light and views — finished to a standard rarely offered at this price on the island.

Every villa is delivered fully furnished and equipped — premium electronics, bespoke furniture, kitchenware and curated décor — ready to live in or rent from day one. Throughout, the build favours high-end, wear-resistant materials and fixtures chosen to endure Thailand's climate, protecting both comfort and long-term value.

Ownership comes with a full hotel-style service layer: butler and concierge, on-demand electric-car logistics around the island, and a clubhouse with gym, co-working space and café. A curated programme of partnerships — Michelin-starred dining, premium beach clubs and spas — lets the residence offer guests far more than a place to stay.

Built for performance, Koh Samui's premium villa segment has been returning 14–16% per annum, and the development targets higher occupancy and rates with a payback around 6.5 years before capital appreciation. Held on a 30-year renewable leasehold, the resort sits on naturally elevated, flood-engineered land with its own back-up generators and artesian well for uninterrupted service.

The two-bedroom homes have now sold; the remaining three- and four-bedroom villas span roughly 167 to 195 m² of interior on plots of 430–534 m², priced from ฿13,000,000. The first phase completes Q4 2026–Q1 2027 and the second Q4 2027–Q1 2028 — a limited release, with several homes already reserved.
